feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Does anyone know how to get the YTD values in SAC Addin for excel?
entry.content:
I just started to explore the SAP Analytics Cloud add-in for Excel and I was wondering how to get the YTD numbers for P&L. I have tried to use the SAP GET DATA formula but have been unsuccessful.

Your help will the greatly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Where are images stored when uploaded directly in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
We have a requirement to have images on a SAC Story. But client is very strict that no images (Company Logo) should be stored on SAC for security reasons. Images are in S4HANA and we are not able to fetch it through CDS views as it does not allow BLOB data type in Consumption View. Looking at the complexity of requirement and other factors I feel uploading images in SAC is best solution. In order to reason out with the client I want to understand the security aspect of storing images in SAC. Where are images stored if upload them to a image widget. eg: in SAP BO images were stored on images folder on server, similarly where is the location of uploaded images in SAC?

Any pointers would be very helpful, TIA

entry.title: Error importing object ID: SAC for planning
entry.content:
Hi
I'm exporting and importing an optimised story and have the below error message:
Error importing object ID: RESOURCE:t.G:36B84E01CD0F49EF7C393F3124EF436C

Correlation ID: 31357238-4915-4493-9158-042277155512

How do I solve that?

thanks!

entry.title: Creating a donut chart with 2 measures or ( in alternative ) show two values
entry.content:
Hi everyone

is there any solution to use a donut chart  but shoving two value ? like quantity and revenue ( as example) 

I din't find any solution to obtain this result.

Best regards

entry.title: SAC Selection Type in SortByValue
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Currently i am trying to have a switch sort my table desecending on two columns(using Meassures) depending on wether the switch in on or off, now i am using the sortByValue from SAC in which you have to give relatedDimensions of type Selection, SortOrder and Direction i have figured out what i need for the latter two but i dont know what or how i can fill the relatedDimensions.

sortByValue function

Also, is this the correct function or am I on the wrong path, if so, please provide the correct path.

Thank you all and Best Regards
Paul

entry.title: Input control unexpected behavior SAC
entry.content:
I have an issue with input controls in a story for a planning model in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) (the model has no data yet). Despite following best practices, I am experiencing unexpected behavior with my input controls.

I have created an optimized story for a planning model. The story includes input controls - for example selecting currency (EUR, USD, GBP) and payment method (B2B, B2C, P2P).

The issue arises when I select a currency and then choose a payment method; the selection for the currency input control disappears, and all options become checked.

Steps Already Taken:
Input Control Properties: I have verified that the "Enable Cascading" option is turned off for both input controls.
Property Filter Settings: The "Linked Analysis" option is set appropriately to avoid unintended filtering.
Model Settings: The dimensions for currency and payment method in the planning model are not linked or dependent on each other.
Version: I am using the latest version of SAP Analytics Cloud available to me.

I would appreciate assistance in resolving this issue. Could you please provide guidance or further troubleshooting steps to ensure that each input control operates independently?

Thank you

entry.title: Calculate Salary % in Advance Formulas Step in DataAction
entry.content:
Hello Team – I have a requirement to calculate "Salary %" as % of days an employee has spent in their 1st or last month of their employment.

For example, In working forecast, if an employee’s last day of the employment is 26th June 2025, I want their salary to be calculated as Total Salary * ( Last Working Day / No. of Days in the month ) è Total Salary *  ( 26 / 30 )  = Total Salary * ( 0.86 )

Logic in Advanced Formulas Step goes like below…

FOREACH.BOOKED [d/TIME] --> I have member set restricted for 18 months (forecast period)

// Derive # of days in Termination month

@DaysInMnth = DAYSINMONTH([d/HRPOSITION].[p/PLAN_TERM])

// Derive Day of the month

@NoOfDays = DAY([d/HRPOSITION].[p/PLAN_TERM])

// Calculate Salary Percentage as Day of Month over No.OfDays

@Salary = @NoOfDays / @DaysInMnth

ENDFOR

I used the variable, @Salary (defined as FLOAT) in the formula to assign it to the measure, SALARY and read it again to calculate the actual salary.

It works fine when I have only one employee with termination date (For ex: 2026-06-26) in the middle of a month.

But as soon as it finds more than one employee, it is taking average value instead of taking it from that employee’s termination date. When I tried to trace the record, it shows both the records in Combined Scope. Below screenshot is for two employees one with termination date as 2026-06-26 and the other with termination date as 2026-06-18

I have the termination date at model level as well. When I use, it considers the combined scope for the month and calculates number of days in month as 961, No of Days as 496 and salary as 0.51 (For example, TIME Dimension – 202510)

Any help here is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Phani

entry.title: Script to extract measure values and loop through them on initialization of page in SAC
entry.content:
Can anyone show me how to code a custom script in SAC optimized design story (on initialization of page) to load the measure values in a table into a variable and then loop through the measure values to check for a condition for each of the values.

I want to create a conditional alert but not able to add code successfully to extract measure values like described above. I have only one measure in the table.

 

Regards,

entry.title: how to build a live connection from SAC to S4HANA On Prem using Cloud Connector?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
 my team has been trying to build a live connection from SAC to S4HANA using cloud connector. We have installed and configured the cloud connector in BTP. We have also installed cloud connector on our S4HANA. But everytime while building a live connection in SAC in the Connections section we keep getting the error : "We couldn't connect to your S/4 HANA system. Possible causes: The SSL certificate is not trusted, or a network error occurred. For more information, see our troubleshooting page.
Correlation ID: 23075871-0937-4657-8611-230123129568"


Can someone please help us to solve this particular error?

entry.title: SAC - Live Data Model- Content Network Storage transport
entry.content:
Hi SAC experts,

I have a HANA Cloud Live Data Model in my dev tenant and need to transport to the other tenants keeping the model format settings.

When I transport via Content Network Storage some model information's are lost, like (SAC Model - Dimensions image):

  • Dimension descriptions added at SAC Model level
  • Hidden Dimensions at SAC Model level

 

 

But for the measures I still can see the same hidden configurations (SAC Model - Measures image).

 

For, the import options I select "Overwrite objects and data".

Do you know if is SAC limitation or am I doing this wrongly?

Thank you in advance,

Rui

entry.title: Time Variance not working for period comparison in SAC for month on month comparison on live connec
entry.content:
Time Hierarchy

  • Time Variance not working for period comparison in SAC in live conenction ? I found few article but they were not so useful, and there is very few documentation on this topic. Any support will be much appreciated.

entry.title: SAC drill down or Hierarchies function for product dimesion LIVE connection
entry.content:
Hello,

I have one question, how can we use CDS Hierarchies for example to drill down on Dimensions? for example how to create level based  like  Region-Country-City drildown or like ( Year>Quarter>Month) 'Level based Hierarchy ?

I want to craete level based Hierarchies for  The field Product Hierarchy (MARA-PRDHA). I am working on LIVE connection. 

Any support would be appreciated.

I saw few articles, buit did not found the excat solution

I am attaching few links below for your reference, 

Hierarchies in CDS views - SAP Community

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/abap-cds-recursive-association-using-hierarchy/ba-p/13455674

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/ABENCDS_F1_DEFINE_HIERARCHY.html

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/beginners-guide-for-cds-hierarchies-part-2/ba-p/13473914

 

SAC output should have drilldown on dimensions like below to represent each category or level separately and user should have choice to see level. Similarly like we have for Date (to see it on year month day)

entry.title: Creating a donut chart with 2 measures or ( in alternative ) show two values
entry.content:
Hi everyone

is there any solution to use a donut chart  but shoving two value ? like quantity and revenue ( as example) 

I din't find any solution to obtain this result.

Best regards

entry.title: SAC Advance Planning - Account Dimension Calculation
entry.content:
Hey all, 

Can anyone help me with getting the calculated North America Revenue to appear in Calculated Gross Sales for the Forecast Version?

The issue I’m facing:

When I use a simple IF statement on Units, the values appear correctly.
However, when I apply a LOOKUP formula and then use an IF statement, the values disappear.
Even if I try to directly display the Stored Price (which is fetched using LOOKUP), the values do not show up.

DRV0050 = Stored Price
DRV0020 = Units

H111100 = Gross Sales 

DRV0055 Lookup Price (NA) = LOOKUP([DRV0050] ,[d/ENTITY]="#" )
- Since price for each product for all US regions stored under entity #
DRV0060 Revenue (NA) = [DRV0020]*[DRV0055]

IF([d/VERSION].[p/CATEGORY]="Actuals" ,[H111100] ,
IF([d/ENTITY].[p/ENTITY_H1L2]="United States" ,[DRV0060] ,[DRV0080]))

entry.title: Send data from Signavio Process intelligence to SAP analytic cloud
entry.content:
We want to send data from SAP Signavio Process intelligence to SAP analytic cloud for analysis.

is there any possibility to do that and if yes, what are the procedure for that.

SAP Signavio Process Intelligence SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Does a SAC workspace functions like private files?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am currently setting up SAC and would like to use the workspaces to clearly separate different departments. Additionally, I want to restrict permissions for private files so that work can only be done in public files.

I have now noticed that when the permissions for private files are removed, there are no files left in the workspace. I assume that a workspace functions like private files. Is that correct?

As a solution, I am left with the option of defining custom roles for the workspace teams, right?

Best regards,
Niels

entry.title: SAC settlement time variance best practices
entry.content:
Hi, 
Is there any best practice for a reconciliation model including a calculation of a settlement time variance. something like that:

Settlement Variance=Actual Settlement Time−Expected Settlement Time

Thanks

entry.title: Does anyone have a workaround for null suppression in a waterfall graph?
entry.content:
In SAP Analytics Cloud I want to remove measures from a waterfall that are null. Given filtering on e.g. profit centers, a measure might end up being null and if the filter changes, the measure might take on a positive or negative value and should then be included again.

Datasource is a SAP Datasphere Analytical Model.

Does anyone have a workaround for null suppression in a waterfall graph? As per KBA 3150383 this is not available even though it is possible to enable zero suppression (which does not seem to work either, see screen shots). A couple of screen shots has been attached for context. 

SAC table of datasource without zero or null suppression.

Same table WITH zero and null suppression. All ok.

Waterfall WITH zero suppression. I want to get rid of the highlighted elements. For some reason, Consulting Fee Recovery is not removed with zero suppression.

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: SAC Date Calculation in DA
entry.content:
I have a “payment method” dimension with an attribute for “Expected Settlement Time”. Based on the method chosen the attribute can be 1/2/3/4 days (the attribute is set as an integer).

I have a measure for incomes, a measure for outcomes and one created to copy the income in the expected settlement date, named “Expected Outgoing”.

My problem is that I don’t know how to write this calculation - copying the some 3-4 days after based on the attribute.

I’ve tried the below, but the syntax isn’t correct, as it mixes date and number of days:

DATA([d/Measures] = "Expected_Outgoing") = 
RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Income", [d/Date] = DATEDIFF( [d/Date],[d/IL_D_POC_RPD_PMNTMTHD].[p/STLMNT_TIME],"DAY" ) )

DATA([d/Measures] = "Expected_Outgoing") =

RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Income", [d/Date] = DATEDIFF( [d/Date], [d/IL_D_POC_RPD_PMNTMTHD].[p/STLMNT_TIME], "DAY" ) )

 

How should I approach that?

entry.title: Fill Parameter Year in Data Action using setParameterValue
entry.content:
Hi,

i'm facing an issue trying to pass a parameter in a data action using setParameterValue. I need to pass a year, as you can do it with the data action trigger.

I've seen that a similar problem has already been discussed, but in my situation, the solution proposed it's not working: 
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sac-fill-parameter-year-in-data-action-using-analytic-app-script/qaq-p/12606009

Am i missing something?

Kind regards,

Enrico
